chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 213 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.902/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 16-09-2025 M/s Achar Khan Gabol and Muhammad Naeem, Advocates for Petitioners M/s Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Soomro and Adnan Arshad Jatoi, Special Prosecutors NAB, Sukkur Mr. Shahryar Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Learned Special Prosecutor NAB submits that Reference in the subject-matter has already been filed being Reference No.01 of 2025 (Re- The State vs. Nasrullah Chandio and others) before the NAB Court, Sukkur. On such statement of learned Special Prosecutor NAB, Counsel for the Petitioners does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioners will agitate their grievance before the trial Court in accordance with the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
